avoid.market: Will the WTI crude oil settlement price be above 77.99 USD/Bbl on Jul 17, 2026? (KXWTIW-26JUL1714-T77.99)

Volume below $50k filter or requires NWS forecast models for same-day highs; no grounding possible
Either volume < $50k, spread > 0.10, or depend on unobservable live spot prices / upcoming BEA/BLS prints; cannot fabricate sources or edges

notes: Only five markets cleared volume >= $50k and spread <= 0.10 filters (three Fed-cut variants, 2027 recession, one WTI binary). All are either multi-month macro paths or 2-day commodity settlements that require live 2026 data releases, futures levels, or weather models unavailable under no-search constraint. Market-implied probabilities already embed consensus; no credible independent source exists for material edge. Zero trades is the disciplined outcome.
